artifactOverLimit: Artifact exceeds the configured FHIR_MAX_ARTIFACT_MB limit and was not returned. Increase the limit or retrieve a smaller resource.
artifactMalformedBase64: The FHIR Binary contained invalid or non-canonical base64 data and could not be decoded.
artifactUnreadableBody: The response body could not be read.
artifactUnsupportedBody: The response body type is not supported.
artifactAttachedNote: The content is attached as an MCP embedded resource; it is not duplicated here.
artifactInvalidUtf8Note: Content declared textual but bytes are not valid UTF-8; returned as binary.
artifactIgnoredShaping: Artifact response — JSON-only shaping arguments ignored: {ignored}.
artifactIgnoredShapingGeneric: Artifact response — JSON-only shaping arguments ignored.
